assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: businesses investing across Meta and Google Ads that need one coherent diagnostic view

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Kanaaloptimalisatie kan weinig oplossen als beide advertentieroutes op een onduidelijke landingspagina uitkomen.
creative_strategy.message_angle: De audit verbindt kanaalcreatief met één gedeelde post-click ervaring.
creative_strategy.hook: Verschillende advertenties landen op dezelfde ervaring.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: Twee verschillende toegangswegen naar één bestemming maken duidelijk waarom de landingspagina cross-platform belangrijk is.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: twee visueel verschillende maar merkneutrale advertentieroutes die naar één centrale landingsruimte leiden
visual_direction.action: de routes worden pas coherent wanneer de centrale ruimte aanbod, bewijs en actie helder organiseert
visual_direction.environment: een donkere architectuurmaquette met één verlichte centrale bestemming
visual_direction.composition: routes komen van links- en rechtsonder, bestemming middenboven, ruime kopzone linksboven
visual_direction.lighting: cyan en violet routes die samenkomen in lime-wit bestemmingslicht
visual_direction.style: premium architecturale editorial 3D met sterke ruimtelijke logica

copy.overlay_headline: Verschillende advertenties landen op dezelfde ervaring.
copy.caption: Meta en Google kunnen verschillende bezoekers brengen, maar de ervaring na de klik moet aanbod, vertrouwen en volgende stap duidelijk maken.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is twee visueel verschillende maar merkneutrale advertentieroutes die naar één centrale landingsruimte leiden. Show de routes worden pas coherent wanneer de centrale ruimte aanbod, bewijs en actie helder organiseert. Set the scene in een donkere architectuurmaquette met één verlichte centrale bestemming. Composition: routes komen van links- en rechtsonder, bestemming middenboven, ruime kopzone linksboven. Lighting: cyan en violet routes die samenkomen in lime-wit bestemmingslicht. Visual style: premium architecturale editorial 3D met sterke ruimtelijke logica. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'De audit verbindt kanaalcreatief met één gedeelde post-click ervaring.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Verschillende advertenties landen op dezelfde ervaring.', support line '$325 Meta + Google Ads Audit', and CTA 'Beoordeel de hele route' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid websiteschermen, verkeersfiles, platformlogo's, conversiecijfers of ingestorte bestemmingen, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
websiteschermen, verkeersfiles, platformlogo's, conversiecijfers of ingestorte bestemmingen

accessibility.alt_text: Twee verschillende advertentieroutes komen samen in één helder georganiseerde landingsruimte.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $325 price and cross-platform scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
